narratives.Overview: Make Relaxanator installable and fully functional offline: web app manifest, service worker precaching the app shell and audio samples.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Web app manifest with icons; app is installable (Add to Home Screen / Dock). FR-2: Service worker precaches the app shell and audio sample assets. NFR-1: After first load, all features work with no network. NFR-2: Passes Lighthouse PWA installability checks.
